The agent's Mongo query to the articles collection (call_Tx60og7AUEob2srbPCrhMwJs) retrieved only 5 articles (IDs 0–4) rather than the full set, so the subsequent join left most Europe metadata rows without titles/descriptions and the keyword-based classification found only 1 business article, yielding an incorrect near-zero average.
